title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXLVI. Relics.
content:
My little old man and I fell out,
        I'll tell you what 'twas all about:
        I had money, and he had none,
        And that's the way the row begun.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCXLVI. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
